div.head: The Chargé in the Soviet Union (Durbrow) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
3202. Printed document has been received by British Embassy here from London containing report of British Ambassador at Nanking regarding conversation with Chou En-lai, Communist representative
at Nanking. Chou reportedly complained to Ambassador of American interference in China and support of KMT.

He was said to have suggested that Ambassador recommend to BevinErnest Bevin, British Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs. that Bevin and MolotovV. M. Molotov, Soviet Minister for Foreign Affairs. call Byrnes to account for violation of Moscow Foreign Ministers Agreement on China.Department of State Bulletin, December 30, 1945, p. 1030.
Repeated to London 344; Paris, 303.Repeated to the Embassy in China in Department’s telegram No. 611, August 15, 4 p.m.
